# RCSService.Business.SuggestedAction.Action.showLocation(_:)

**Case**

Show location action.

## Declaration

```swift
case showLocation(RCSService.Business.ShowLocationAction)
```

## Handling location actions

- **RCSService.Business.ShowLocationAction**: Shows a location on a map.
- **RCSService.Business.SuggestedAction.Action.sendLocation**: Send location from device to business.
